verses.text: Certain are barred from the congregation of the LORD. Barred. Holiness has its bounds.
Certain are barred from the congregation of the LORD. Barred. Holiness has its bounds.
Certain are barred from the congregation of the LORD. Barred. Holiness has its bounds.
Ammon and Moab are excluded, for they hired Balaam. Excluded. Old enmity is remembered.
Ammon and Moab are excluded, for they hired Balaam. Excluded. Old enmity is remembered.
Ammon and Moab are excluded, for they hired Balaam. Excluded. Old enmity is remembered.
Edomites and Egyptians may enter in the third generation. Mercy. Grace softens the bar.
Edomites and Egyptians may enter in the third generation. Mercy. Grace softens the bar.
Keep the camp clean in time of war. Clean camp. God walks among them.
Keep the camp clean in time of war. Clean camp. God walks among them.
Keep the camp clean in time of war. Clean camp. God walks among them.
Bury filth, for 'the LORD thy God walketh in the midst.' His presence. Even camp life is hallowed.
Bury filth, for 'the LORD thy God walketh in the midst.' His presence. Even camp life is hallowed.
Bury filth, for 'the LORD thy God walketh in the midst.' His presence. Even camp life is hallowed.
Shelter the escaped servant; oppress him not. Refuge. Mercy to the fleeing.
Shelter the escaped servant; oppress him not. Refuge. Mercy to the fleeing.
No temple harlotry; bring no such hire to God's house. Holy. Worship is kept pure.
No temple harlotry; bring no such hire to God's house. Holy. Worship is kept pure.
Lend not upon usury to your brother. No usury. The brother is not exploited.
Lend not upon usury to your brother. No usury. The brother is not exploited.
Pay your vows; better not vow than not pay. Vows. A promise to God binds.
Pay your vows; better not vow than not pay. Vows. A promise to God binds.
Pay your vows; better not vow than not pay. Vows. A promise to God binds.
You may eat of your neighbour's field, but carry none away. Fair. Mercy with limits.
You may eat of your neighbour's field, but carry none away. Fair. Mercy with limits.
